headline: Gilead Deepens Oncology Reach And HIV Prevention With Arcellx And Lenacapavir
summary: Gilead Sciences (NasdaqGS:GILD) has completed all regulatory approvals for its acquisition of Arcellx, finalizing the year's largest biopharmaceutical deal. The company is also widening access to its long acting HIV prevention therapy lenacapavir through expanded international programs and partnerships. For readers watching large cap biopharma, these two developments show where Gilead is currently focusing its efforts: cell therapy and HIV prevention. Arcellx adds to Gilead's cell therapy...
